series_metadata.series_description: This report provides information detailing the DHO Allowance and SHO Appeal time frames. It provides specific performance data within the adjudication process utilized as the boundary for a specific interval time period. The action dates are Filing Date, Hearing Date, Typing Date, and Findings Mailed Date. These dates are used to measure various statutory time frame requirements pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 4123.511

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: reports six months from publish date
